request.description: Fetch vault level authentication token.

With the server level authentication token you can make a request to list the vaults and get the vault level authentication token of the correct vault.

request.description:
Sets the given properties creating new properties and overwriting existing values. The object does not have to be checked out.

Check the datatype number from the MFWS documentation (Enumerations).

0	Uninitialized	
1	Text	
2	Integer	
3	Floating	
5	Date	
6	Time	
7	Timestamp	
8	Boolean	
9	Lookup	
10	MultiSelectLookup	
11	Integer64	
12	FILETIME	
13	MultiLineText	
14	ACL

Sets all properties of the object. The missing properties will be removed. The object does not have to be checked out.

Also the Object Class can be changed with this method.
